title: Xanthous Pillowy British Sea Bass Dolsot Stone Bowl Scones with Clotted Cream
description: A show-off British dish featuring pillowy sea bass fillets, served in a Dolsot stone bowl with clotted cream and scones, perfect for a special occasion.
instructions: Preheat your Dolsot stone bowl in the oven to 425°F (220°C).
Season the sea bass fillets with salt, pepper, and a squeeze of fresh lemon juice.
Add a tablespoon of oil to the hot Dolsot stone bowl and sear the sea bass fillets for 2-3 minutes per side.
While the sea bass is cooking, prepare the scone mix according to the package instructions.
Scoop the scone mix into the hot Dolsot stone bowl, around the cooked sea bass fillets.
Top the scones with a dollop of homemade or store-bought clotted cream, a sprinkle of fresh dill, and a squeeze of fresh lemon juice.
Garnish with a sprinkle of garlic powder and serve immediately.

axes.dishForm: Dolsot Stone Bowl Scones with Clotted Cream
